violations.text: Pizza chips packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Ambient temperature of prep unit observed at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Cheese stick in this unit observed at 56 degrees F. Voluntary disposal during inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is repaired/temperature adjusted and unit maintains a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
